iterate_latest.summary: Fixed the campaign board's per-step Copy-launch button being permanently disabled for campaigns whose campaign.md bolds the step ID (**C1**) or adds Repo/Depends-on columns. parseSubIteratesTable now maps columns by header name and strips inline Markdown emphasis from cells, so each step's <id>-<slug>.md spec path resolves (non-null) and the launchable gate flips false->true. Verified by a real-producer-data round-trip through readCampaigns() against the live 2026-06-02-compliance-detective-realign campaign.

unit.evidence: full server vitest suite (120 files / 1504 tests) green; tsc --noEmit clean

integration.reason: server-side pure-parser fix; no integration surface

e2e.reason: verified via server-boundary real-data round-trip (see surface_verification); client launchable gate is an unchanged pure derivation of specPath

surface_verification.justification: Server-side Sub-Iterates parser fix (no client/** change). Verified by a real-producer-data round-trip through readCampaigns() against the live on-disk 2026-06-02-compliance-detective-realign campaign: nextPending.id resolves '**C1**'->'C1' and specPath resolves to the real C1-audit-run-id-provenance.md (non-null), so the board launchable gate Boolean(next && next.specPath) flips false->true. The client derivation is unchanged + pure, so the server boundary is the determining surface. Live-API confirmation on :3847 follows the dist rebuild + restart.

behaviors.behavior: bold producer ID (**C1**) strips to plain id (C1)
behaviors.evidence: campaign-parse.test.ts 'strips Markdown emphasis from the ID cell' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: status read from Status column not the 4th positional cell (6-col Repo/Depends-on table)
behaviors.evidence: campaign-parse.test.ts 'reads status from the Status column, not the 4th positional cell (6-col)' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: slug + title inline emphasis/code spans stripped
behaviors.evidence: campaign-parse.test.ts 'strips inline emphasis/code from slug + title cells' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: status read by header name for the 5-col (Depends on) shape
behaviors.evidence: campaign-parse.test.ts 'reads status by header name for the 5-col (Depends on) producer shape' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: headerless table falls back to positional [id,slug,title,status]
behaviors.evidence: campaign-parse.test.ts 'falls back to positional ... for a headerless table' PASSED
campaign-parse.test.ts 'parses data rows, skipping the header + separator' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: colon alignment separator row still tolerated (regression)
behaviors.evidence: campaign-parse.test.ts 'tolerates alignment colons in the separator row' PASSED
campaign-parse.test.ts 'returns [] when there is no Sub-Iterates table' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: real on-disk campaign resolves non-null specPath + launchable=true (consumer round-trip)
behaviors.evidence: tsx readCampaigns() probe vs real 2026-06-02-compliance-detective-realign: nextPending={id:C1, specPath:.../C1-audit-run-id-provenance.md}; LAUNCHABLE=true

enumeration_basis.basis: diff-introduced parser behaviors + preserved regressions (bug fix; no formal ACs)
